prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约1387→2123→1751→2379→592，2024年因新高考专业组划分出现较大波动，2025年大幅前移至约592名，竞争明显加剧；近两年位次波动较大，2025年基准约592名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年64人、2022年90人、2023年88人、2024年54人、2025年52人；2026年计划48人，较2025年减少4人（缩招约7.7%），缩招使竞争进一步加剧，位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第14名（2025年第13名），稳居全国Top20，学校层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校处理迅速高效，舆情影响有限；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），短视频平台关注度处于中上水平，对报考热度有一定正向作用；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科12个，包括信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、光学工程A等，学科实力雄厚，与当前高热专业（计算机、电子信息、人工智能）高度吻合，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与北理工优势学科高度匹配；本省2026年考生总数约167000人（较2025年172114人略有下降），物理类估算约113894人，竞争基数略有缩小；北京理工大学位于北京（非本省），在黑龙江招生占比不高；2025年该校在黑龙江招生约13人（占全国总招生约2.2%），地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移趋势、2026年计划缩招7.7%加剧竞争、学校层次极高且优势学科与热门专业高度匹配等因素，预计2026年理科/物理类最低位次在2025年基准592名基础上继续前移；预测最低位次约565名，区间500–630名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间500–630名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（卓越班/未来精工/徐特立英才班）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<500名）可重点冲击一档专业；位次接近区间上限（约630名）应以二档为主、三档保底。北理工工科试验班大类招生覆盖多个A类学科，专业分流时需关注具体方向热度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1387 → 2123 → 1751 → 2379 → 592. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination major group division, there was significant fluctuation. In 2025, the ranking moved sharply forward to about 592, indicating intensified competition. Rankings have fluctuated considerably in recent years, with a baseline of about 592 in 2025. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 64 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 88 in 2023, 54 in 2024, and 52 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 48, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 7.7%), further intensifying competition and putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 14th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (13th in 2025), firmly in the national Top 20. The school's level is extremely high, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (such as the Gong Lin incident), but the school handled it quickly and efficiently, limiting public opinion impact. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively popular), with short video platform attention at an upper-middle level, having a certain positive effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above, including Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, etc. The discipline strength is robust, highly aligned with currently popular majors (computer science, electronic information, artificial intelligence), strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely matching BIT's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 167,000 (slightly down from 172,114 in 2025), with an estimated 113,894 in the physics category, slightly reducing the competition base. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing (not in the province), with a relatively low enrollment share in Heilongjiang. In 2025, the school enrolled about 13 students in Heilongjiang (about 2.2% of total national enrollment), so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in rankings in 2025, the 7.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the extremely high school level, and the strong alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the 2026 science/physics category will continue to move forward from the 2025 baseline of 592. The predicted minimum ranking is about 565, with a range of 500–630.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical and Electrical).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Including Digital Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 500–630, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Class/Future Precision Engineering/Xu Teli Talent Class) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<500), focus on Tier 1 majors. If the ranking is near the upper bound (about 630), prioritize Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as backup. BIT's engineering experimental class large-category enrollment covers multiple A-level disciplines; attention should be paid to the popularity of specific directions during major selection.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 443 → 446 → 514 → 400. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking shifted back to 514, and in 2025 it significantly moved forward to about 400. The fluctuation range over the past 3 years is about 114 places, with a baseline of about 400 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 2 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 21 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18, an increase of 2 (about 12.5% expansion) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition, putting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 14th. The university level is very high, and it has brand appeal for liberal arts candidates as well. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly involves teacher ethics incidents in science and engineering, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions. Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level. BIT is known for science and engineering, with liberal arts only offering Social Science Experimental Classes (Humanities and Social Sciences direction, Management and Economics direction). Among corresponding disciplines, Management Science and Engineering is rated A, and Business Administration is rated A-, showing strong strength, but the overall coverage of liberal arts disciplines is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social sciences (law, economics, business administration) have a divided and watchful social popularity, with relatively stable application enthusiasm for liberal arts majors. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in the province is about 53,106 (slightly lower than 54,707 in 2025), so the competition base has slightly shrunk. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from Heilongjiang. The number of liberal arts admissions in the province is very small (only 16 in 2025), and the small enrollment scale may lead to larger ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of rankings in 2025, the 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, and the small liberal arts enrollment scale prone to fluctuations, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 will slightly shift back from the 2025 baseline of 400. The predicted minimum ranking is about 430, with a range of 381–479.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: BIT only has 2 enrollment majors in liberal arts/history category in Heilongjiang, with a very small number of students (18 in 2026), so ranking fluctuations may be large. Within the predicted ranking range of 381–479, the Humanities and Social Sciences direction (including law, AI dual degree, etc.) requires a higher ranking, while the Management and Economics direction is relatively easier to enter. It is recommended to aim for the Humanities and Social Sciences direction as a reach and use the Management and Economics direction as a safety.
